mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) AND is_read = 0
